WHISTLESTOP TOUR
military hardware_ Less than twenty years later; the Clan jug gernaut swallowed up all but seven Rasalhague worlds Only the intervention of ComStar and the Battle of Tukayyid prevented nation from disappearing entirely   Rasalhague remains essentially ComStar protectorate; Ithe order relocated its headquarters there after the Word of Blake conquered Terra ComStar" pervasive presence has drawn opposition from Rasalhague'$ ner leader: Elected Prince Regent Christian Mansdotter: staunch advocate of Rasalhagian nationalism; Mansdotter has  begun make trouble what terms ComStar'$ occupying force. The ofticial language of the Republic is Swedish; English and German are also commonly spoken.
Terra Terra has always occupied a important place in the heart of humankind: The bir thplace humanity, became the crown jewe of the Terran Alliance, the Terran Hegemony and finally the Star League. with the tall of the Star League  following the Amaris Civil War. ComStar took control of Terra and sealed it off from other worlds. In 3057_ Terra fell radical splinter group of ComStar known as the Word of Blake_ With the widest mix of cultures, languages. religions and eth: nic groups any human-inhabited planet; Terra serves as touch- stone for humans other planets, regardless of how many thou: sands of light-ycars and hundreds of centuries separate them:
CLAN OCCUPATION ZONE The Clan invasion placed large sections of the Federated Commonwealth_ Free Rasalhague Republic and Draconis Combine under Clan rule_ The spinward region occupied by the Smoke Jaguars and Nova Cats, was liberated in 3059 and returned t0 the Combine. The rest remains under Clan control, The Steel Vipers and Jade Falcons shared the farthest anti- spinward section until 3061 when the Vipers attempted to gain total control of the territory: Their campaign backfired, giving the Falcons control of all fifty-three worlds_ Sudeten is the Jade Falcon regional capital. Despite recent losses the Ghost Bears and Hell s Horses the latterof which have   established three-world enclave between Wolf ad Ghost Bear territory Clan Wolf con trols the largest swath ot Clan-occupied territory: Clan Wolf lead: ers have made point of establishing Eood relations between the Wolves and the native population, allowing both to prosper: The Wolf Clan regional capital is Tamar; The Ghost Bears shocked their fellow Clans and the Inner Sphere by relocating their Inner Sphere holdings, region mostly Combine planets centered on Alshain and now known as the Ghost Bear Dominion, Factions within the Combine regard the Bears as a occupying force and are blocking efforts toward official recognition of the Dominion as nation_
Tukayyid Until 3052, Tukayyid was backwater agricultural world, known for its high-quality grain and spectacular scenery Then Clans and ComStar  agreed fight proxy battle Tukayyid to determine control of Terra, vaulting the sleepy Iittle planet into the pages of history: After twenty-one days of bitter conflict ComStar won fifteen-year truce from the Clans Native farmers returned t0 find their lands devastated, littered with tne debris war Over tne past decade, however. the Free Rasalhague Republic and ComStar have made impressive strides restoring the world.
CHAOS MARCH Originally Capellan territory annexed by the Federated Suns the Fourth Succession War the 3ica immediately rmward of Terra was thrown into confusion by the Marik-Liao assault on the Federated Commonwealth 3057 Many planets became de facto independent, though the Confederation has made Giot but sure Bains among the rimward worlds During the past four years_ the coreward worlds within thirty-nine light-years of Terra have slowly come under the influence of Word Blake. though Blakist control is contested by ComStar and numerous petty warlords_
Outreach Once major Star League facility ad home the SLDF Martial Olympiad Outreach was seized the Capellan Confederation and subsequently fire-bombed by the Free Worlds League the First Succession War. As part of tne short-lived Tikonov Free Republic _ joined the Federated Suns after the Fourth Succession War; and the mercenary group Wolf' 5 Dragoons took as a independent landhold: The Dragoons rebuilt the planetary economy and reopened many lost" manu: facturing   facilities that they used to strengthen their forces_ Under the Dragoons- suzerainty; Outreach and its capital Harlech nave become tne center of mercenary activity in the Inner Sphere. recent years the   difficulty getting Outreach which lies in the heart of the Chaos March-~has prompted some suegest reopening the hiring halls on Galatea_ the so-called Mercenary"- Star in Lyran Alliance territory:
Alshain mineral-poor world with temperate climate Alshain has few large production facilities save for its single BattleMech fac: tory:  This Iow level of industry has left its vast pine forests almost untouched Until Clan Ghost Bear conquered December of 3051_ Alshain had proud history as prominent Draconis Combine world_ The Ghost Bears wasted Iittle time bringing the Mech factory back on-line, and it has since become the Bears primary facility: In 3060_ the Bears chose Alshain their Inner Sphere capital:
Twycross The third planet seven Twycross renowned extreme climate changes caused by Its FO1V-type and prox- imity t0 Iarge_ hot gas giant: The arid Plain of Curtains ire quently    suffers titanic sandstorm dubbed the Diabolis b} locals, with winds clocked at more than 350 kph.
